scripts.build: npm --prefix apps/web/server install && npm --prefix apps/web/dashboard install && npm --prefix apps/web/dashboard run build
scripts.dev: concurrently -n s,d "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:dashboard"
scripts.lint: npm --prefix apps/web/dashboard run lint && node scripts/check-server-syntax.mjs
scripts.audit: npm audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix apps/web/server audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix apps/web/dashboard audit --audit-level=high && npm --prefix apps/mobile audit --audit-level=high
scripts.release:verify: npm run lint && npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run smoke && npm run ops:db-backup && npm run ops:db-restore-probe
